# Baseline profile-selection (captured pre-Workstream-B on branch 039, Compose v5.2.0)
# Generated by: docker compose -p mcm -f stacks/mcm.compose.yaml --env-file stacks/mcm.env <P> config --services | sort

## profile: NONE   (flags: <none>)
mc-service-store-mongo
mc-service-store-mongo-rs-init
mcm-bff-cache-redis
mcm-bff-store-mongo

## profile: app   (flags: --profile app)
mc-service
mc-service-store-mongo
mc-service-store-mongo-rs-init
mcm-bff-cache-redis
mcm-bff-store-mongo

## profile: bff-nonsecure   (flags: --profile bff-nonsecure)
mc-service-store-mongo
mc-service-store-mongo-rs-init
mcm-bff-cache-redis
mcm-bff-service-nonsecure
mcm-bff-store-mongo

## profile: bff-secure   (flags: --profile bff-secure)
mc-service-store-mongo
mc-service-store-mongo-rs-init
mcm-bff-cache-redis
mcm-bff-service-secure
mcm-bff-store-mongo
mcm-bff-tls-proxy

## profile: agents   (flags: --profile agents)
mc-service-store-mongo
mc-service-store-mongo-rs-init
mcm-bff-cache-redis
mcm-bff-store-mongo
movie-assistant-gateway
movie-assistant-mcp-movie
movie-assistant-mcp-spreadsheet
movie-assistant-mcp-webapi
movie-assistant-store-postgres

## profile: agents-metro   (flags: --profile agents-metro)
# PRE-EXISTING (on main, not introduced by Workstream B): `--profile agents-metro` ALONE errors —
#   "service movie-assistant-gateway-metro depends on undefined service movie-assistant-store-postgres: invalid compose project"
# because the metro gateway (profile agents-metro) depends_on the store-postgres (profile agents), which
# is not enabled by agents-metro alone. In practice agents-metro is run alongside agents. Workstream B
# only relocates `profiles:` keys (not depends_on), so this error must reproduce IDENTICALLY post-change.

## profile: app+bff-nonsecure   (flags: --profile app --profile bff-nonsecure)
mc-service
mc-service-store-mongo
mc-service-store-mongo-rs-init
mcm-bff-cache-redis
mcm-bff-service-nonsecure
mcm-bff-store-mongo
